name: Swiss Steak (P/c)
recipeIngredient: 1 Beef arm roast or chuck roast (trimmed/cut into 2-inch cubes)
4 cups Canned whole tomatoes with juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tbsp peanut oil in a very hot pressure cooker pot.
2. Add beef cubes and brown on all sides until well done.
3. Stir in the diced onion, minced garlic, sliced celery, diced bell pepper.
4. Add canned tomatoes with juices, tomato sauce, salt, Louisiana hot sauce, and crumbled oregano.
5. Place the lid securely on the pressure cooker and put the regulator weight in place.
6. Maintain high heat until the weight begins to jiggle.
7. Reduce heat so the weight is just barely moving.
8. Cook for 20-25 minutes (depending on meat quality).
9. Turn off heat, remove the pot from the cooker, and open the lid.
10. Gently stir the contents and check the gravy's consistency.
11. If the gravy is too thin, return to high heat and reduce until desired thickness.
12. If it's too thick, add a small amount of water.
13. Serve over baked macaroni and cheese with peas sautéed in onions and pine nuts.
